EXHIBIT A
PRICING SCHEDULE
SignaPay will retain the following cost amounts for the services rendered under this Agreement. Income
over and above this cost will be split 80 % to ISC and 20 % to SignaPay.

ITEM
ISC COST PER ITEM
V/MC/Discover Interchange plus Dues & Asses.
Pass-Thru
Authorization/Capture/Settle
$0.04 /item
BIN Sponsorship Fee
2.0 basis points (0.020%) on the gross processing sales dollar volume
Liability/Risk Fee
2.0 basis points (0.020%) on the gross processing sales dollar volume
Merchant Account on File
$2.00/per account per month
Merchant Statement
$2.00/statement per month
Gov't Regulatory Program (billed to merchant at $2.95) $2.95
Next Day Funding $5.00/month
Annual Fee $5.00
PIN Debit Transaction Fee $0.06
EBT Authorization Fee $0.06
Batch Header $0.03
Voice Authorization Inquiry $0.98/attempt
AVS $0.02
Monthly Minimum (billed to merchant at $20.00) $5.00/month
Cancellation Fee (billed to merchant at $495.00) $0.00
Amex OptBlue Sponsor Cost 20.0 basis points (0.20%) on the gross AMEX sales dollar volume
Micros Authorization/Capture $0.065/attempt
PCI Non-Compliance Fee (billed to merchant at $49.95/monthly) $14.95/month
PCI Program Fee (billed $9.95/monthly) $4.00

Priority/First
Data Specific Items
ITEM
ISC COST PER ITEM
PCI Program Fee (billed to merchant at $99/year)
$30.00
Buypass Statement Fee
$0.25
Buypass Pre Auth Fee (Pay-at-the-Pump)
$0.01 /occurence
Buypass Down Services
$1.00/full download, $0.50/partial, $0.50/table
Missing Originals Fee $1.00/day
Help Desk/Service Calls $3.00
After-Hours Help Desk Calls $5.75
